title: stevia procumbens
intro: Stevia procumbens, also known as Stevia rebaudiana, is a plant species native to South America, particularly in Paraguay and Brazil, that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stevia procumbens include lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and aiding in weight management, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Stevia procumbens can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, as well as in its natural form as a sweetener.
